languages.text: "Хм... кажется, я могу припомнить значение этих кодов..."
"Hmm... These codes seem familiar. I think I recall what they signify..."

languages.text: 「うーん…このコードはどこかで見たことがあるような気がする。意味は何か思い出せるかもしれない…」
languages.original_text: "Hmm... These codes seem familiar. I think I recall what they signify..."

languages.text: "Bu kodlar tanıdık geliyor. Ne anlama geldiklerini hatırlıyor gibiyim..."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... These codes seem familiar. I think I recall what they signify..."

traits.locale_text: "Bu kodlar tanıdık geliyor. Ne anlama geldiklerini hatırlıyor gibiyim..."

languages.text: “嗯……这些代码似曾相识。我大概能想起它们的含义……”
languages.original_text: "Hmm... These codes seem familiar. I think I recall what they signify..."

traits.locale_text: “嗯……这些代码似曾相识。我大概能想起它们的含义……”

languages.text: "Hmm ... Diese Codes kommen mir bekannt vor. Ich glaube, ich erinnere mich, was sie bedeuten ..."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... These codes seem familiar. I think I recall what they signify..."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ... Diese Codes kommen mir bekannt vor. Ich glaube, ich erinnere mich, was sie bedeuten ..."

languages.text: « Hmm… Ces codes disent quelque chose. Je crois me souvenir ce qu'ils signifient… »
languages.original_text: "Hmm... These codes seem familiar. I think I recall what they signify..."

languages.text: «Mmm... Estos códigos me suenan. Creo recordar lo que significan...».
